message:
Update Meta Skill related project reference

Change relatedProjects for Meta Skill from clawdbot-skills (deprecated)
to mcp-agent-mail to reflect the current project ecosystem.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1040,7 +1040,7 @@ export const projects: Project[] = [
       ],
       installation: "```bash
# Install via Cargo
cargo install meta_skill

# Or download pre-built binary from releases
```",
       usage: "```bash
# Start MCP server for AI agents
ms mcp serve

# Search for skills
ms search 'error handling'

# Token-packed loading within budget
ms load <skill> --pack 2000

# Security scan for prompt injection
ms security scan <file>

# Graph analysis via bv
ms graph insights
```",
-      relatedProjects: ["cass", "clawdbot-skills"],
+      relatedProjects: ["cass", "mcp-agent-mail"],
     },
   },
   {
